workshoptitle: Optimize Vehicle Routes with NVIDIA cuOpt on OCI

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: Overview of the cuOpt accelerator pack and the workshop tracks.

tutorials.title: Lab 1 - Explore Pack Services
tutorials.description: Find each pack URL and sign in to Blueprints, Prometheus, and Grafana.

tutorials.title: Lab 2 - Connect to Your OKE Cluster
tutorials.description: Install the OCI CLI and kubectl, then generate a kubeconfig for the cluster.

tutorials.title: Lab 3 - Submit an Optimization Job from the UI
tutorials.description: Run a baseline cuOpt optimization from the front-end.

tutorials.title: Lab 4 - Submit Jobs Directly to the cuOpt API
tutorials.description: Log in to the auth service from Python and submit cuOpt requests with a bearer token.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving live help.
